creator: dewayne@heuristicsystems.com.au
text:
Squirrelmail is tied to php5.3 due to a handling of special html characters issue. Two patches are required to address.  These patches form part of a future release and have been added as patches r14345 & r14346. Would it be possible to incorporate the patches identified at the bottom of:
http://sourceforge.net/tracker/?func=detail&atid=100311&aid=3491925&group_id=311

Fix: 

Refer to patches above.
How-To-Repeat: Review mail/squirrelmail/Makefile
